manifest_metadata.denominator_disclosure: The source denominator remains 25 frozen source/obfuscation variants; 23 are tokenizer-eligible and span 19 canonical problems. These waves add only repeated concrete inputs.
manifest_metadata.outcome_blind_disclosure: Selection used no model completion, score, or other model outcome; this preparer performs no language-model inference.
manifest_metadata.selection_unit: canonical dataset row + suite + dataset test index
manifest_metadata.timing_disclosure: Specified after the initial 23-case screen and while the corrected 60-case supplemental screen was running, before corrected supplemental model outputs or scores were inspected.

tokenizer_preflight.selection_rule: Retain only cases whose exact Qwen2.5-14B-tokenized CodeSteer prompt yields a non-positional SlicingPrior vector, an active CASES signal, and fits context.

outcome_selection_note: The complete screened pool is retained. Any later all-baselines-fail/CodeSteer-succeeds case-study subset is outcome-selected and must be labeled as such.

score_definition.canonicalization: CRLF/CR to LF, then strip leading/trailing whitespace; internal whitespace preserved
score_definition.name: trimmed_exact_match

static_prior_cache.reason: The unmodified runtime requests the same prompt-static slice once per steered layer and decode token. Recomputing it changes neither the vector nor sampling, but is prohibitively expensive for 250--350-line programs.
static_prior_cache.semantic_effect: none; memoizes a deterministic prompt-static prior vector
